cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.heroMeta: effective from the date of publication on the website

intro.title: General information
intro.text: The website {{domain}}, owned by {{company}}, uses cookies and similar technologies to ensure proper operation, analyze traffic and conduct marketing activities.

whatAreCookies.title: What are cookies?
whatAreCookies.text: Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device (computer, smartphone, tablet) while browsing the website.

types.title: Types of cookies used
items: Necessary cookies – enable proper website functionality.
Analytics cookies – used to analyze website traffic (Google Analytics 4).
Marketing cookies – used for advertising purposes (Google Ads, remarketing).

ga4.title: Google Analytics 4
ga4.text: The website uses Google Analytics 4 provided by Google Ireland Limited to analyze traffic and visitor statistics. Data is processed anonymously and may be transferred outside the European Economic Area in accordance with applicable law.

ads.title: Google Ads
ads.text: The website uses Google Ads advertising tools, including remarketing. This allows users to receive tailored advertisements within the Google advertising network.

consent.title: Google Consent Mode v2
consent.text: The website uses Google Consent Mode v2 to manage user consent for analytics and marketing cookies in accordance with GDPR and Google requirements in the European Union.

management.title: Managing cookies
management.text: Users can change cookie settings at any time via browser settings or the consent management panel available on the website.

changes.title: Changes to the Cookie Policy
changes.text: The current version of the Cookie Policy is always available on {{domain}}.
